rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALFRED A. KERAN TRUST
THE ESTATE OF MEGAN LOUISE FURTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Motion For Order Staying Deposition And Quashing Sokol'S Further Amended Notice Of Deposition (Transferred From 610, Pursuant To Ccp 170.6)
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Frederick P. Furth's Motion For Order Staying Deposition of Petitioner and Quashing Sokol's Further Amended Notice of Deposition: Denied. As to any responsive documents for which a privilege is asserted, deponent is required to identify those documents at the deposition with particularity so that beneficiary may have the opportunity to challenge any such claims. The provisions of Comm. Chan's orders regarding the scheduling of depositions remains in effect. Petitioner's deposition shall proceed no later than January 6, 2006 pursuant to the Further Amended Notice of Deposition that is the subject of this motion. Beneficiary's request for sanctions is denied. (612/HEWLETT)
